memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< MetalResources > resources, int dim, idx_t nlist, faiss::MetricType metric, float metricArg, faiss::gpu::IndicesOptions indicesOptions, bool interleavedLayout)
memberdef.name: MetalIVFFlatImpl

briefdescription.para: Reset all IVF lists and free GPU storage.
Reserve host/GPU storage for at least totalVecs vectors.

memberdef.argsstring: (idx_t n, const float *x, const idx_t *list_nos, const idx_t *xids)
memberdef.name: appendVectors

detaileddescription.para:
Append a batch of vectors to IVF lists.
x: host pointer, size n * dim
list_nos: host pointer, size n; -1 entries are skipped
xids: host pointer, size n (may be null to use internal ids)

briefdescription.para: Accessors for future GPU search path.
Pre-built GPU buffer of (nlist) uint32_t offsets (updated on every add).
Pre-built GPU buffer of (nlist) uint32_t lengths (updated on every add).
Interleaved codes buffer (blocks of 32 vectors, dims interleaved).
Per-list float offsets into the interleaved codes buffer.
Rebuild interleaved buffers from host storage if they are stale.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< size_t > &oldLength, const std::vector< size_t > &addPerList, const std::vector< uint8_t > &movedLists, bool forceFullUpload)
memberdef.name: uploadToGpu_

detaileddescription.para: GPU-resident IVF list storage for flat (float32) codes. Layout: all lists are stored contiguously in a single codes/ids buffer; lists are described by (listOffset[list], listLength[list]).
